name: China
summary: Old Castro claimed to have sailed to strange ports and talked with undying leaders of the cult in the mountains of China.
description: China enters the record through the prisoner Castro, who claimed to have sailed to strange ports and talked with undying leaders of the cult in the mountains of China.

sources.quote: who claimed to have sailed to strange ports and talked with undying leaders of the cult in the mountains of China
sources.context: Chapter 2, The Tale of Inspector Legrasse
